creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
Yes, I can try to maintain audio/re and audio/baresip if none else is interested.

audio/re was already updated by riggs@ (d45ea8db947ff569f2eba233d2c7179dc2189df0), so PR #273761 can be closed. Now audio/baresip (3.4.0) no longer builds. Please commit this update. Thanks.
